<!-- Thanks for the PR. Keep this short. -->

## Summary

<!-- One paragraph: what changed and why. -->

## Type

- [ ] feat — new tool / resource / prompt / capability
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] perf — performance improvement
- [ ] refactor — internal cleanup, no behavior change
- [ ] docs — README / CHANGELOG / SECURITY only
- [ ] ci — workflows, dependabot, build scripts
- [ ] chore — version bumps, deps, lint

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes (live MTender hits expected)
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated under `## [Unreleased]` if user-visible
- [ ] Public protocol surface unchanged, OR a minor version bump is included
- [ ] No credentials / secrets in any added file
- [ ] Security-relevant change? Tag `@nalyk` or open privately first

## Notes for the reviewer

<!-- Anything non-obvious about the change. -->
